treatment_information.specific_treatment: posterior fossa craniotomy, C1-T3 laminectomy, and total resection of the foramen magnum to T3 intramedullary tumor
treatment_information.treatment_response: gross total resection achieved, no obvious surgical-related complications

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted to the neurosurgery department
Surgery performed: posterior fossa craniotomy, C1-T3 laminectomy, and total resection of the foramen magnum to T3 intramedullary tumor
Magnetic resonance imaging scan showed no residual tumor or recurrence, and whole spinal syringomyelia disappeared completely
Patient had full strength in all extremities and her numbness resolved

patient_outcome.final_status: Full strength in all extremities, numbness resolved, living a normal life without any symptoms
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Excellent recovery of neurologic function and no signs of complications and recurrence
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Lived a normal life without any symptoms
